chunks.title: The Metaphor of the Heated Oven
chunks.reason: Describes the internal corruption and anger of Ephraim's leaders using the metaphor of an oven.

chunks.title: The Cake Not Turned
chunks.reason: Continues the baking metaphor to describe Ephraim's foreign alliances and lack of self-awareness.

chunks.title: The Silly Dove and the Net
chunks.reason: Uses the image of a foolish dove seeking Egypt and Assyria to illustrate impending judgment.

chunks.title: Deceitful Bow and False Worship
chunks.reason: Concludes with the failure of their worship and the metaphor of a deceitful bow leading to defeat.
